definitions.name: filter:where:HOSP_ADMSN_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where hosp_admsn_time is between '2025-01-01' and '2025-12-31'

definitions.name: filter:where:ADT_PAT_CLASS_C
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where adt_pat_class_c IN (1, 2, 3)

definitions.name: filter:where:DEPARTMENT_ID
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where not (department_id IN (100, 200))
